contestName: ICPC 武汉全国邀请赛暨湖北省赛

blocks.text: Given a sequence of n non-negative integers a1, a2, · · ·, an, and two sequences of length m, c1, c2, · · ·, cm and x1, x2, · · ·, xm. It is guaranteed that all xi are positive integers. You need to perform m operations in order from 1 to m. In the i-th operation, you modify the current sequence a based on the value of ci:

items: If ci = 1, you must perform aj ← mex(aj, xi ) for all aj.
If ci = 2, you must perform aj ← gcd(aj, xi ) for all aj.
If ci = 0, you can freely choose to perform either of the two operations mentioned above.

blocks.text: After all m operations are completed, determine whether it is possible to make all elements in sequence a equal. Additional notes regarding the mex and gcd operations are as follows:

items: The binary operation mex(u, v) is defined as the smallest non-negative integer that is not equal to u and not equal to v. For example: mex(0, 1) = 2, mex(2, 2) = 0.
For the greatest common divisor gcd, it is specifically defined that gcd(0, x) = x.

blocks.text: The first line contains the number of test cases $T$ ($1 \le T \le 10^4$). For each test case:

items: The first line contains $n,m$ ($1 \le n,m \le 3\times10^5$), the sequence length and number of operations.
The second line contains $n$ integers $a_1,a_2,\ldots,a_n$ ($0 \le a_j \le 10^9$).
Each of the next $m$ lines contains $c_i,x_i$ ($0 \le c_i \le 2$, $1 \le x_i \le 10^9$), describing the $i$-th operation.

blocks.text: The sum of $n$ over all test cases does not exceed $3\times10^5$, and the sum of $m$ over all test cases does not exceed $3\times10^5$.
For each test case, output one line. If it is possible to make all numbers equal after all operations are finished, output “Yes”; otherwise, output “No”.

For the first test case: in the first operation, choose to apply the gcd operation, and the sequence becomes [1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1]. In the following 5 operations, no matter which operation you choose, the elements of the sequence will always remain equal, so output “Yes”. For the second test case: the only operation is c1 = 1, x1 = 1, so you can only choose the mex operation.
The final sequence becomes [2, 0, 0], and it is impossible to make all numbers equal, so output “No”.
给定一个长度为n的非负整数序列a1,a2,···,an，以及两个长度为m的序列c1,c2,···,cm和x1,x2,···,xm。保证xi均为正整数。你需要从1到m依次顺序执行m次操作。在第i次操作中，你可以根据ci的值对当前的序列a进行修改：

items: 若ci=1，那么你只能对所有的aj执行aj←mex(aj,xi)。
若ci=2，那么你只能对所有的aj执行aj←gcd(aj,xi)。
若ci=0，你可以自由选择执行上述两种操作中的任意一种。

blocks.text: 在所有m次操作执行完毕后，判断最后能不能让序列a中的所有数都相等。关于运算mex和gcd的额外说明如下：

items: 定义二元操作mex(u,v)表示不等于u且不等于v的最小非负整数。例如：mex(0,1)=2，mex(2,2)=0。
对于最大公约数gcd，特别定义gcd(0,x)=x。

blocks.text: 第一行包含测试数据组数 $T$（$1 \le T \le 10^4$）。对于每组测试数据：

items: 第一行包含两个整数 $n,m$（$1 \le n,m \le 3\times10^5$），分别表示序列长度和操作次数。
第二行包含 $n$ 个非负整数 $a_1,a_2,\ldots,a_n$（$0 \le a_j \le 10^9$），表示初始序列。
接下来 $m$ 行，第 $i$ 行包含 $c_i,x_i$（$0 \le c_i \le 2$，$1 \le x_i \le 10^9$），描述第 $i$ 次操作。

blocks.text: 保证所有测试数据中 $n$ 的总和不超过 $3\times10^5$，且 $m$ 的总和不超过 $3\times10^5$。
对于每组测试数据输出一行。如果在所有操作结束后能让所有数都相等，则输出“Yes”；否则输出“No”。
对于第一组数据：在第一次操作时，选择执行gcd操作，序列将变为[1,1,1,1,1,1,1,1]。在后续的5次操作中，你无论选择什么操作，序列元素始终会保持一致，因此输出“Yes”。对于第二组数据：唯一的一次操作是c1=1，x1=1，你只能选择mex操作。
最终序列变为[2,0,0]，无法让所有数字相等，输出“No”。
